steps.title: Compute the intercept
steps.content: This gives $y=11$, so the $y$-intercept is $(0,11)$. That matches Choice C — $(0, 11)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches Choice C — $(0, 11)$, $(0, 11)$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C.
